title: Soil testing/Hands on Trainings for farmers of adjoining areas at School of Agriculture
content: Galgotias University laboratories are equipped with advanced equipment which is a valuable resource for local farmers. These facilities help in soil testing, disease diagnosis, and other analytical processes critical for sustainable farming. Our university with greenhouse facilities provide local farmers with space to experiment with controlled environments, test different crops, and extend growing seasons, contributing to increased crop yields and agricultural diversity. Our university hosts workshops, training sessions, and field days to teach farmers about sustainable farming practices, soil conservation, pest management, and crop rotation. These events offer practical knowledge to improve agricultural techniques.
